experiences.description: Mengembangkan antarmuka pengguna interaktif menggunakan React dan Next.js

experiences.summary: Delivered 10+ web projects for clients across various industries.
experiences.content:
Specialized in responsive UI design and performance optimization.

  • Utilized Next.js SSR/SSG to boost SEO rankings.

  • Integrated headless CMS architectures.

achievements.title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect
achievements.description: Mendemonstrasikan keahlian tingkat lanjut dalam merancang sistem terdistribusi di platform Amazon Web Services (AWS).
achievements.label: Cloud Architecture
